connectionString.description: The Oracle database instance to connect to

privilege.description: The privilege to use when connecting to the database

useThickMode.description: Define type of connection with database

walletPassword.description: The password to decrypt the Privacy Enhanced Mail (PEM)-encoded private certificate, if it is encrypted

walletContent.description: The security credentials required to establish a mutual TLS (mTLS) connection to Oracle Database

sslServerCertDN.description: The distinguished name (DN) that should be matched with the certificate DN

sslServerDNMatch.description: Whether the server certificate DN should be matched in addition to the regular certificate verification that is performed

sslAllowWeakDNMatch.description: Whether the secure DN matching behavior which checks both the listener and server certificates has to be performed

poolMin.description: The number of connections established to the database when a pool is created

poolMax.description: The maximum number of connections to which a connection pool can grow

poolIncrement.description: The number of connections that are opened whenever a connection request exceeds the number of currently open connections

maxLifetimeSession.description: The number of seconds that a pooled connection can exist in a pool after first being created

poolTimeout.description: The number of seconds after which idle connections (unused in the pool) may be terminated

connectTimeout.description: The timeout duration in seconds for an application to establish an Oracle Net connection

transportConnectTimeout.description: The maximum number of seconds to wait to establish a connection to the database host

expireTime.description: The number of minutes between the sending of keepalive probes
